scripts.build:cashier-android: npx vite build && cd apps/cashier-android && npx cap sync android
scripts.open:cashier-android: cd apps/cashier-android && npx cap open android
scripts.apk:cashier-android: npx vite build && cd apps/cashier-android && npx cap sync android && npx cap build android --apk
scripts.build:admin-android: npx vite build && cd apps/admin-android && npx cap sync android
scripts.open:admin-android: cd apps/admin-android && npx cap open android
scripts.apk:admin-android: npx vite build && cd apps/admin-android && npx cap sync android && npx cap build android --apk
scripts.build:captain-android: npx vite build && cd apps/captain-android && npx cap sync android
scripts.open:captain-android: cd apps/captain-android && npx cap open android
scripts.apk:captain-android: npx vite build && cd apps/captain-android && npx cap sync android && npx cap build android --apk
scripts.verify:captain: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='dist/captain.html';if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.error('missing '+p);process.exit(1)}const c=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');if(c.includes('localhost')){console.error('localhost found in '+p);process.exit(1)}console.log('captain build OK')"
